name: NjordScan — vulnerable-shop
description: Attack surface of vulnerable-shop from a NjordScan v2.0.0b1 scan: 30 findings across 8 ATT&CK techniques. Score = number of findings mapping to each technique.

techniques.comment: 14 finding(s) — Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools [Initial Access]. Rules: deps.known-vulnerability
7 finding(s) — Exploit Public-Facing Application [Initial Access]. Rules: ai.endpoint-no-auth, ai.no-rate-limit, config.missing-security-headers, nextjs.dangerous-config, sqli.string-concatenation
4 finding(s) — Command and Scripting Interpreter: JavaScript [Execution]. Rules: xss.dangerously-set-inner-html, xss.inner-html
3 finding(s) — Resource Hijacking [Impact]. Rules: ai.endpoint-no-auth, ai.no-rate-limit, ai.unbounded-output
2 finding(s) — Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files [Credential Access]. Rules: secret.aws-access-key, secret.generic
1 finding(s) — Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Supply Chain [Initial Access]. Rules: supply-chain.dangerous-install-script
1 finding(s) — Unsecured Credentials [Credential Access]. Rules: secret.public-env-exposure
1 finding(s) — Browser Session Hijacking [Collection]. Rules: config.missing-security-headers
